name: Cilantro Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3 large tomatoes or 5-6 plum tomatoes, diced small
1 jalapeno or other hot pepper, diced (you may choose to remove the seeds)
Juice of 2 limes or a combination of one lemon and one lime
Salt to taste (Note: You can adjust the amount of salt according to your preference)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the tomatoes into small pieces.
2. Finely chop the white onion.
3. Remove the seeds from the jalapeno or other hot pepper, and finely dice it.
4. Squeeze the juice from 2 limes (or one lemon and one lime) into a bowl.
5. Add the chopped cilantro to the bowl with the lime juice.
6. Season with salt to taste.
7. Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl.
8. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least a few hours, or ideally overnight, before serving.
